label: Water Cycle Imbalance Ontology
description: Domain ontology for representing basin water-cycle imbalance as concepts, spatial contexts, evidence, literature, datasets, and derived results.

Basin.description: A spatial catchment feature supplied by the Foundation base map.

RegionContext.description: A named spatial research context such as a case-study basin, aquifer, delta, or transboundary region.

ImbalanceMode.description: A reusable water-cycle pattern or imbalance diagnosis, such as groundwater depletion, reservoir regulation, monsoon recharge, or snow/glacier melt control.

HydrologicalProcess.description: A physical or human process that explains water-cycle behavior.

Literature.description: A paper, report, or scholarly record used as evidence.

Dataset.description: A dataset pointer or local dataset descriptor used by a module.

BasinTimeSeries.description: A time-indexed set of observations joined to a Foundation basin by basin_id.

HydrologicalVariable.description: A measured or modeled hydrological flux or storage state with a unit and temporal resolution.

AnalysisResult.description: A derived result produced from imported data, scripts, or module logic and attachable to a basin, mode, or region.

basin_has_mode.description: Assigns a basin to a water imbalance mode by spatial rules, model output, or imported evidence.

basin_matches_region.description: Links a foundation basin feature to a named module region using spatial matching.

mode_has_process.description: States which processes define a mode.

paper_evidences_mode.description: Links literature to an imbalance mode after semantic audit.

paper_studies_region.description: Links literature to a specific research region when the abstract or metadata identifies the study area.

dataset_supports_process.description: States which hydrological process can be measured or constrained by a dataset.

time_series_describes_basin.description: Joins a module-owned time series to a Foundation basin using an exact basin_id match.

time_series_observes_variable.description: States which hydrological variables are represented by a basin time series.

result_attaches_to_basin.description: Attaches a user-generated or module-generated result to a foundation basin.

moduleManifest.description: A JSON manifest that declares entry script, class name, ontology, knowledge graph, layers, panels, and data products.

knowledgeGraph.description: A JSON object containing concepts, spatial contexts, literature records, and typed relations.

tabularEvidence.description: CSV rows that can become point layers, basin attributes, time series, or relation tables after field mapping. Spatial joins may use entity identifiers such as basin_id and do not require latitude/longitude.

scriptResult.description: A script-generated JSON result that can register new layers, panels, charts, or basin attachments.
